description: Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) — AI-powered GitHub PR explainer & review assistant

backlog.title: Project scaffolding and tooling
backlog.description: Initialize project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest, ESLint.

backlog.title: PR URL parser
backlog.description: Pure function parsePrUrl(input) that extracts {owner, repo, pullNumber} from a GitHub PR URL.

backlog.title: GitHub API client — PR metadata
backlog.description: Fetch PR metadata from GitHub REST API v3.

backlog.title: GitHub API client — PR diff
backlog.description: Fetch raw unified diff for a PR.

backlog.title: Claude API client (raw fetch)
backlog.description: Client using raw fetch to POST api.anthropic.com/v1/messages. API key passed as parameter (user-provided). No SDK dependency.

backlog.title: Extension scaffold (Manifest V3 + Vite)
backlog.description: Manifest V3, Vite + CRXJS, popup/options/background entry points. Removed all Next.js files.

backlog.title: Options page (API key management)
backlog.description: React options page where users enter ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (required) and GITHUB_TOKEN (optional). Keys stored in chrome.storage.local. Includes storage.ts wrapper module.
acceptance_criteria: Options page renders with two input fields (Anthropic key, GitHub token)
Save button persists keys to chrome.storage.local
On load, existing keys are populated (masked display)
Success/error feedback on save
Clear button removes stored keys
storage.ts provides getApiKeys() and setApiKeys() typed wrappers

backlog.title: Popup UI — input form with auto-detect
backlog.description: PrUrlForm component in popup. Auto-detects PR URL from current tab using chrome.tabs.query. Also supports manual URL paste.
acceptance_criteria: On popup open, queries active tab URL
If active tab is a GitHub PR page, pre-fills the URL input
Manual URL input with validation on blur
Submit button disabled when empty or loading
Shows 'No API key configured' with link to options if key missing

backlog.title: Popup UI — loading + results display
backlog.description: AnalysisLoading and AnalysisResults components for the popup.
acceptance_criteria: Loading shows spinner with status text and aria-busy
Results render summary, key changes with impact, risks with severity badges, suggestions
Empty arrays show 'None identified'
Content scrollable within popup height constraint (600px max)

backlog.title: Popup UI — error display
backlog.description: ErrorDisplay component with user-friendly error messages, retry button, and link to options for key errors.
acceptance_criteria: Displays error in styled alert with role=alert
Maps error codes to friendly messages
401 errors show 'Invalid API key' with link to options
404 errors suggest adding GitHub token for private repos
Retry button calls onRetry

backlog.title: Integration layer (orchestration)
backlog.description: analyzer.ts orchestrates full flow: read keys from storage, parse URL, fetch PR, process diff, call Claude. Popup App.tsx wires state machine.
acceptance_criteria: analyzePr(url) reads keys from storage and runs full pipeline
Returns typed AnalysisResponse on success
Throws typed errors for each failure mode
Popup App.tsx uses state machine: idle -> loading -> success/error
Retry resets to idle with URL pre-filled

backlog.title: Content script (optional GitHub PR button)
backlog.description: Content script that injects an 'Analyze with GitBrief' button on GitHub PR pages.
acceptance_criteria: Injects button near PR title on /pull/ pages
Clicking opens the popup or triggers analysis
Only runs on github.com/*/pull/* pages

backlog.title: CI pipeline + Chrome Web Store packaging
backlog.description: GitHub Actions CI (lint, typecheck, test). Build produces ZIP for Chrome Web Store.
acceptance_criteria: CI runs lint, typecheck, test in parallel on PRs
Build produces dist/ directory
Package step creates gitbrief-extension.zip
